case_title: CHEN, LEAH VS PETERSON, GLORIA BALANAY

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $862.69 FILED BY CHEN, LEAH AS TO DEFENDANT PETERSON, GLORIA BALANAY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-08-2005 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT PETERSON, GLORIA BALANAY PLAINTIFF HAS NO STANDING TO SUE BECAUSE SHE IS NOT THE REGISTERED OWNER OF THE CAR. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PETERSON, GLORIA BALANAY
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAR-08-2005, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAR-29-2005 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TO CURE UNTIMELY SERVICE & TO ALLOW DEFENDANT TO FIND AN/OR RELACE HER GLASSES.
